pilot.d: -15% fuel burn, +25% flee chance, dodges hazards.

mechanic.d: Auto-repairs 3 hull/day in flight (6 with Workshop). Halves breakdown damage.

medic.d: Keeps the sick alive. With a Med Bay, cures passengers fully.

cook.d: -25% food consumption. Morale you can taste.

fugitive.d: Wanted by somebody. Patrols may cause trouble.

merchant.d: May offer to buy your goods mid-flight at a premium.

spy.hint: asks a lot of casual questions
spy.d: Delivering them will shift faction politics — somehow.

pilgrim.hint: hums quietly and tips in blessings
pilgrim.d: Easy passenger. Word of your kindness spreads (+prestige).

drifter.d: Just needs to be somewhere else. Don't we all.
